title: Unified Diff Quick Reference
body: Unified diff changes targeted lines instead of rewriting whole files. It is efficient, smaller in token cost, and safer for autonomous editing.

title: Master While Loop Pattern
body: A coding agent can repeatedly ask the model for tool calls, execute them, and feed the results back until the model stops. The loop stays simple and model-driven.

title: AgentFS Notes
body: AgentFS stores workspace state on disk so runs can be resumed and audited. It complements long-running agent workflows and keeps artifacts visible.
